examples: She built bookshelves out of bricks and planks.
I knocked some bookshelves together from old planks.
A glance along his bookshelves reveals a bewildering array of interests.
Yet today these imposing tomes that bent the bookshelves of yesterday's children are gathering dust.
The living room has built-in bookshelves and offers broad, breathtaking views through a bank of windows.
